meta.title: kulupu lipu pi toki pona pi mani ala
meta.description: lipu ni li kulupu pi lipu kama sona lon toki pona.

hero.title: kulupu lipu pi toki pona pi mani ala
hero.subtitle: lipu ni li kulupu pi lipu kama sona lon toki pona. o open kepeken kulupu lipu pi kama lukin. o kama sona sin kepeken sona Sonko. o lukin e lipu lawa lon toki pona.
hero.note: lipu ale lon ni li mani ala. sina ken kama jo e ona, sina ken lukin e ona. sina wile ala pana e nimi sina.
hero.primary_cta: o lukin e lipu pi mani ala

why.title: tan seme la kulupu ni li pona?

clarity.title: toki lili li pana e lukin pona
clarity.text: toki pona li weka e kalama mute. lipu ni li pona tawa lukin pi tenpo lili. sina ken lukin sin e ona lon tenpo mute.

free.title: open pi mani ala
free.text: lipu ale lon lipu ni li mani ala. sina ken kama jo e lipu ilo. sina ken lukin e lipu poka tawa kama sona.

practice.title: nasin kama sona
practice.text: o kepeken ona sama nasin kama sona: o open, o lukin, o lukin sin, o kama sona. sina kama sona kepeken lukin mute, kepeken sona nimi taso ala.

collection.title: lipu pi mani ala
collection.subtitle: lipu tu wan ni li open pona tawa lukin e toki pona lon lipu lon. ona li jo e nasin lipu poka tawa kama sona.

readers-kit.title: kulupu lipu pi kama lukin
readers-kit.author: jan ABVX
readers-kit.summary: lipu ni li kulupu open pi kama sona. ona li tan kulupu lipu pi sona Seto lon toki pona. ona li jo e toki pona ale pi toki pona pi jan Pitako. lipu ni li lon sitelen Lasina, li jo kin e lipu sama tawa sitelen pona. nasin lipu li sama lon kulupu ale: o lukin lili, o lukin sin, o kama sona.
readers-kit.notes: ijo insa: toki pona ale pi jan Pitako; sitelen Lasina; lipu sama tawa sitelen pona; nasin lipu pi kama sona.
readers-kit.promoAlt: sitelen pi kulupu lipu pi kama lukin

chinese-wisdom.title: sona Sonko
chinese-wisdom.author: jan ABVX
chinese-wisdom.summary: lipu ni li open pi kulupu sona Sonko lon toki pona. ona li pana e nasin lukin pi kulupu lipu ni. nasin sama li lon lipu ante sama lipu pi sona utala en lipu nasin. lipu ni li jo e toki pona ale pi olin ale pi jan Mosi. nasin lipu li pona tawa lukin sin, li pona tawa kama sona.
chinese-wisdom.notes: ijo insa: olin ale pi jan Mosi; nasin lukin pi kulupu sona Sonko; lipu poka tawa kama sona.
chinese-wisdom.promoAlt: sitelen pi sona Sonko lon toki pona

heart-sutra.title: lipu lawa
heart-sutra.author: jan ABVX
heart-sutra.summary: lipu lawa ni li toki ante pi mani ala. ona li kama poka kulupu sona Sonko lon toki pona. lipu ni li jo e sitelen Sonko, e toki ante pi lukin, e toki pona, e lipu sama tawa sitelen pona. ona li pona tawa lukin pi tenpo lili, li pona tawa pali kama sona pi tenpo ale.
heart-sutra.notes: ijo insa: sitelen Sonko; toki ante pi lukin; toki pona; lipu sama tawa sitelen pona.
heart-sutra.promoAlt: sitelen pi lipu lawa lon toki pona

faq.title: sona pi wile sona
faq.subtitle: sona lili ni li toki e toki, e mani ala, e nasin kepeken.

items.a: tomo ni li kulupu pi lipu pi mani ala. ona li jo e lipu kama sona lon toki pona, e lipu toki ante, e nasin kama jo.

items.q: lipu ni li mani ala ala?
items.a: lipu ale lon ni li mani ala. sina ken kama jo e ona, sina ken lukin e ona. sona pi ken kepeken li lon lipu wan wan.

items.q: mi sona ala e toki pona. mi ken open ala open?
items.a: sina ken open. kulupu lipu pi kama lukin li pona tawa jan open. nasin lipu li pana e pona tawa jan pi lukin nanpa wan.

items.q: mi ken kama sona lon tenpo mi taso anu seme?
items.a: sina ken. lipu ni li pona tawa kama sona pi tenpo lili. o lukin lili, o lukin sin e lipu sama, o lukin e nimi pi kama sin.

items.q: tan seme la sitelen li lon tu?
items.a: lipu mute li jo e sitelen tu: sitelen Lasina pi toki pona, en lipu sama tawa sitelen pona. ni li pana e pona tawa lukin e nimi lon nasin ante.

items.q: mi ken toki e pakala lon seme?
items.a: o open e toki pakala lon GitHub. o pana e nasin tawa lipu, o toki lili e pakala.

paragraphs: kulupu lipu pi kama lukin li lipu pi open tawa jan pi kama sona. ona li pana e lipu lili tawa lukin, tawa ni: sina ken open lukin e toki pona lon tenpo poka.
nasin lipu li pana e pali pona: o lukin lili, o lukin sin, o sona e nimi pi kama lon lukin. lipu mute la sitelen Lasina en lipu sama tawa sitelen pona li lon, tawa pona pi lukin.
o kepeken lipu ni sama open. tenpo la sina kama sona e nasin, la o tawa lipu ante pi mani ala lon tomo ni, o kama sona mute kepeken lukin.
sona Sonko li lipu pi mani ala. ona li ante e toki pi lipu sinpin lon toki pona lon nasin pi lukin pona, pi pilin pona.
lipu ni li pali tawa kama sona: nasin sitelen li sama lon lipu ale, la sina ken weka e wile pi alasa sona ike, o lukin taso, o lukin sin.
sina pilin pona tan nasin ni la o kepeken ona sama nasin tawa kama sona. lukin mute li pana e sona mute.
lipu lawa lon toki pona li toki ante pi mani ala tawa lukin en tawa kama sona. lipu ni li lili, la ona li pona tawa lukin sin lon tenpo mute.
lon lipu ni la sina ken kama jo e lipu ilo, en sina ken lukin e toki ante. sina wile pana e sona sin anu toki e pakala la o open e toki pakala lon GitHub.
o lukin kepeken tenpo lili. o lukin sin. lukin mute la nimi en nasin toki li kama sona.

legal.title: nasin lawa
body: tomo ni li kulupu pi lipu pi mani ala tawa toki pona. ABVX li pana e nasin tawa lipu ilo en lipu poka.
sina ken kepeken lipu ni tawa pali pi mani ala. lipu wan li jo e nasin lawa ona la nasin ona li lawa.
ABVX li pana e lipu sama ni: ona li lon. nasin ante li ken kama pakala. sina lukin e pakala la o toki lon GitHub.

privacy.title: sona len
body: tomo ni li wile ala e nimi pi jan. sina ken lukin e lipu, sina ken kama jo e lipu, sina pana ala e sona sina.
ken la ilo pali li awen e sona lili tawa sona pi pali pona. mi pana ala e sona pi jan tawa mani.
sina toki tawa mi kepeken email la mi kepeken toki sina tawa toki sin taso. sina ken toki e pakala lon GitHub kin.

translator.title: ilo ante toki pona
translator.subtitle: o ante e toki tawa toki pona.

learn.title: sona Sonko lon toki pona
learn.subtitle: kulupu lipu pi sona Sonko lon toki pona.

stoic.title: sona Seto lon toki pona
stoic.subtitle: kulupu lipu pi sona Seto lon toki pona.
